sentences.text: You've reached the offices of Trinity property consultants F P a multi, family and Redwood construction your call may be monitored or recorded for quality purposes. Please listen carefully. As our menu options have changed. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time for our address and office hours. Please select four for accounts payable, please select five for our company directory for like six or anything else. Please use your telephone keypad to enter the first two or more letters of the person's first name. Cassandra Kaufman retaining extension one zero eight six for to complete your call to this person press one to hear the next name press two to repeat the current name. After the Arc extension one zero eight four six to complete your call to this person press one to hear the next name. We are sorry, there is no one available to take your call. Please record your message after the tone.
